adultsOnly.title: Adults Only
adultsOnly.subtitle: Winko is an anonymous platform for adults.
adultsOnly.check1: I am 18 years old or older
adultsOnly.check2: I understand that adult content may be displayed

register.title: Create your account
register.ageWarning: You must be 18 years or older to join. Providing false information will result in a permanent ban.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to:
verifyEmail.instructions: Please check your inbox and confirm your account to continue.

yourIdentity.title: Your anonymous identity
yourIdentity.subtitle: Your identity in Winko is:
yourIdentity.privacy1: Nobody will see your real name.
yourIdentity.privacy3: Nobody will see your exact location.

preferences.title: Personalize your feed
preferences.subtitle: Choose the categories you want to see (minimum 1)

welcome.title: Welcome to Winko!
welcome.creditsSub: We've added 20 credits to your account as a welcome gift.
welcome.description: Start rating and discover what people really think.

location.title: See content near you
location.subtitle: To show you content nearby, we need your location.
location.privacy1: Your exact location is never public.
location.privacy2: You will only see approximate distances.
